evidence_refs.source_quote: Average paid weekday subway ridership rose 5% in May to 3.845 million
Paid weekday bus ridership also rose 5% from April to 1.479 million
Bus speeds remained flat from last year at 8.0 mph
the Bronx has shown improvement in 2023, with speeds 5% faster than pre-COVID for non-express routes

payload.raw_value_text: 6% faster all day compared to pre-COVID
payload.scope: Bronx changed routes, weekday all day

evidence_refs.source_quote: Weekday speeds on the changed routes in 2023 were 6% faster all day compared to pre-COVID
Overall satisfaction in May 2023 was 61%

payload.description: ABLE camera enforcement activated on Bx36 route along Tremont Ave Corridor

evidence_refs.source_quote: we celebrated another milestone in the deployment of ABLE cameras as we activate enforcement on the Bx36 route
ABLE has issued more than 255,000 violations
the MTA will now have 503 buses (18 routes) equipped with ABLE cameras
Customer Journey Time Performance (CJTP) was 70.6%
Service Delivered remained at 95%
Ride-Time Performance was an impressive 98%
